mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document_chunks ( id, document_id, chunk_index, section_label, content_text, content_summary, start_offset, end_offset, entity_list, embedding_model, embedding_vector, content_hash, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{entity.id}, #{entity.documentId}, #{entity.chunkIndex}, #{entity.sectionLabel}, #{entity.contentText}, #{entity.contentSummary}, #{entity.startOffset}, #{entity.endOffset}, #{entity.entityList}::jsonb, #{entity.embeddingModel}, #{vector}::vector, #{entity.contentHash}, now(), now() )
mapper.select: SELECT dc.id, dc.document_id, dc.chunk_index, dc.section_label, dc.content_text, dc.content_summary, dc.start_offset, dc.end_offset, dc.entity_list, dc.embedding_model, dc.content_hash, dc.created_at, dc.updated_at, 1 - (dc.embedding_vector <=> #{vector}::vector) AS similarity_score FROM document_chunks dc JOIN documents d ON dc.document_id = d.id WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} AND d.document_status = 'INDEXED' ORDER BY dc.embedding_vector <=> #{vector}::vector LIMIT #{topK}
